one_liner: Editorial gemology reference database with mineral specimen pages, gem grading charts, cutting-style galleries, geological origin maps, certification guides, and collector glossaries; jewel-toned dark luxurious UI with rich visual density, curated collection-style navigation, hover-triggered color-shift animations on gem classification cards, and a refined browsing experience spanning eight detailed reference sections.

metadata.animation_target_hint: gem classification card background and border color transitioning through a jewel-tone palette shift
metadata.animation_side_effects: none — card remains in DOM, visible, no scroll or layout change
